description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On October 9, 2025 at 2:25 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Los Angeles, California was in a collision 
involving an SUV on Clinton Street near N. Kenmore Avenue.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling eastbound on a narrow portion of Clinton Street with vehicles parked on both sides when it came to a stop to 
yield to an SUV traveling westbound on Clinton Street. As the SUV passed the stationary Waymo AV, the left side of the SUV made 
contact with the rear left side of the Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous 
mode. The SUV sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
